items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
New Colors Available ~ Fresh and Elegant
Blue stripe fabric and calfskin Triumph, echoing each other to create a fresh spring/summer texture. The craftsmanship is fine, with exquisite stitching. The overall design is fresh and gentle, has capacity and looks great, and goes well with any outfit, easily switching styles, ❤️. It also has a shoulder strap for crossbody wear, combining practicality and aesthetics.
Casual style, literary fresh, Mori girl style are all great.
Capacity: No need to question, it definitely holds a lot 👍
Style No.: 199162
Size: 26×19×13

items.name_en: New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
CE's best-selling shoulder bag, handwoven body with natural warmth in every texture. Get close and smell the faint scent of grass and wood, as if storing the freshness of the entire summer.
🪧The handle is paired with soft cowhide, adding durability and cleverly balancing the rusticity of the straw with the premium feel of the leather, simple and exquisite, complementing the overall style.
💼Don't let its small appearance fool you, it holds a lot! The interior space is organized, easily accommodating daily essentials like a phone, wallet, sunscreen, and lipstick. The built-in inner pocket is perfect for important cards and keys, making them easy to access.
🌟And it is simply a "universal player" in styling. Pair it with a white dress for a lazy French vacation vibe at the beach, the photo atmosphere is maxed out.
For daily wear with simple T-shirts and jeans, it becomes the finishing touch, adding a touch of sophistication and casualness to a casual outfit. Whether for vacation, picnics, or shopping, it fits perfectly✅
Model:115703
Color:Raffia/Brown
Size:22x13.5x4cm (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
New Arrival🅰️🅰️CE Triomphe Kelly Handbag👜
New Triomphe Kelly bag, full of high-class feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette presenting a capable style and pure aesthetics. Whether it is steady black, low-key brown, or soft pink, it exudes incomparable high-class feel❤️ The Kelly classic shape has simple and generous lines, no need for extra decoration, and instantly shows aesthetic charm🫶🏻
Style No.: 188836
Color: Black
Size: 25.5x18.5x10

items.name_en: New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
items.name_cn:
New In Stock 🅰️🅰️ CE New Camille 16 Soft
CE Camille new arrival quietly returns to a minimalist elegant style. You can see this from the latest member of the 16 Soft series, the Camille 16 Soft bag. This new design retains the series' signature soft lines and outlines a casual composure with a Hobo silhouette, showing this isn't a bag trying to attract attention, but capturing hearts with low-key charm.
The Camille 16 Soft uses smooth calfskin with a natural sheen. The overall shape is fluid yet structured. The front features the brand's classic 16 metal lock detail. Without excessive decoration, it perfectly showcases taste. Camille 16 Soft comes in Medium and Small sizes. Colors range from steady black and classic tan to warm white and light sand. Every tone echoes the brand's commitment to eternal aesthetics. Just casually holding it gives an effortless chic look.
Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. Rotating lock closure.
1 main compartment, 1 interior zip pocket.
Includes 1 removable shoulder strap and 1 removable adjustable long strap.
Model: 120693
Color: Brown
Size: 24.5x21.5x5cm
(with original packaging)
